action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Design, construction, materials used or maintenance of food contact surface improper.  Surface not easily cleanable, sanitized and maintained.
Hot TCS food item not held at or above 140 °F.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Single service article not provided. Single service article reused or not protected from contamination when transported, stored, dispensed. Drinking straws not completely enclosed in wrapper or dispensed from a sanitary device.

Food, prohibited, from unapproved or unknown source, home canned or home prepared. Animal slaughtered, butchered or dressed (eviscerated, skinned) in establishment. Reduced Oxygen Packaged (ROP) fish not frozen before processing. ROP food prepared on premises transported to another site.
